case_title: NAHAL VAHEDI VS. JAZMINE MAY NAVA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVER SERVED JUN-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NAVA, JAZMINE MAY
ORDER CONTINUED TO JAN-18-2018 AT 8:30AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - JAZMINE MAY NAVA;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - MOVED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAHEDI, NAHAL AS TO DEFENDANT NAVA, JAZMINE MAY
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PER (SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY VAHEDI, NAHAL AS TO DEFENDANT NAVA, JAZMINE MAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JAZMINE MAY NAVA 2721 BELLEVUE AVE LOS ANGELES, CA 90026
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING (SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS):
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ENTERED NOVEMBER 2, 2017. (506)

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO JASMIN NAVA ON 11/02/17 - PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAHEDI, NAHAL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/11/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-18-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NAHAL VAHEDI APPEARED. DEFENDANTS JAZMINE MAY NAVA APPEARED. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY AND PLAINTIFF AGREES TO ACCEPT $250.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON AUGUST 21, 2017 AND $250 ON THE 21ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL FULL AMOUNT OF $3000.00 IS PAID TO PLAINTIFF WHO IS ENTITLED TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR REMAINING BALANCE IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY FULLY WITH THIS INSTALLMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY IF PAYMENTS ARE RECEIVED. MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED TO EARLY SEPTEMBER 2018 FOR DISMISSAL. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NAHAL VAHEDI RE: DEFENDANT ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAHEDI, NAHAL
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:[X] YOU MUST COME TO COURT TO BE HEARD.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF SC-105 REQUEST AND ANSWER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 09/26/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS--WAIVER. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAHEDI, NAHAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVA, JAZMINE MAY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
